_comment: Per-model CONDUCT overrides for JARVIS (Stage 4.1). OVERRIDES ONLY — never duplicate catalog fields (context_length/cost/description live in model_catalog.json). Resolution: exact id -> longest family substring -> DEFAULT_PROFILE (mirror off, monitor on). All Wave-1 seeds keep mirror_ok=false; flip to true ONLY for a model live-verified to surface output with MIRROR-lite on. Seeded from the 4 First-Light-observed models (KB L322/L355).

nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free.notes: First Light default brain. Buries output inside MIRROR-lite (mirror must stay off, L322). Emits malformed/multi-object tool-call JSON and repeats identical calls (safety floor repairs; dialect SUCCESS is 4.1 W2). L355.

openai/gpt-oss-120b.notes: Returns EMPTY final content under a system prompt — all tokens spent in the reasoning channel; llm_client empty-content retry handles it (L322).

stealth/owl-alpha.notes: Speaks proprietary tool markup (longcat_tool_call), not our JSON contract. Excluded by pick_free_model _AVOID_SUBSTRINGS; profiled for documentation only (L322).

nemotron.notes: Nemotron family: mirror off (reflection-protocol output burial observed on nemotron-3-super, L322).

qwen.notes: Free Qwen endpoints 429-saturate under load; conservative conduct, no mirror (L322).

llama.notes: Free Llama endpoints 429-saturate under load; conservative conduct, no mirror (L322).
